title: Chemical safety - Canada.ca
content:
Safe handling and health effects of chemical substances including Canada's Chemicals Management Plan.

## Services and information

### Chemicals and your health
Product safety, measuring the health effects of exposure to chemicals and chemical contaminants in food.

### Safe handling, labelling of chemicals
Label workplace chemicals using Canada's hazard communication standard and chemicals management programs.
Canada's approach for assessing and managing chemical substances.

### Chemicals at a glance
Key facts on chemicals assessed for potential health and environmental risks.

### Chemical risk assessments
How and why we do assessments under the Chemicals Management Plan.
- Environment and Climate Change Canada
